summary: Iteration 7 (AI + India GST compliance) — Tested all 5 backend endpoint groups and 7 frontend flows. 22/22 backend tests passing. All AI integrations (Claude Sonnet 4.5 via Emergent key) working end-to-end including SSE streaming. Public GSTIN/HSN tools work without auth and correctly hide AI tabs in publicMode. In-app /tools page works for all 4 tabs. Ask BillEasy AI chat streams responses with live business context. Parties GSTIN field auto-validates with state lookup. Products HSN suggester (bundled + AI) works. E-Invoice JSON generator endpoint correctly produces schema-1.1 payload and dialog precheck shows actionable errors.

issues: Recharts ResponsiveContainer logs repeated warnings: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' — non-blocking but pollutes console. Likely a minHeight/minWidth missing on the chart wrappers.

action_items: Optional: Update seed data so Vijay Traders org.gstin and Sundar Electronics party gstin pass the mod-36 checksum (e.g. set org to '29AABCT1332L1ZA'). Currently they are structurally close but fail checksum, so the E-Invoice happy-path (ok:true with downloadable JSON) is not reachable in the demo without fixing settings/parties manually. The precheck UX is correct and informative, so this is a polish-only item.
Optional: silence Recharts width(-1)/height(-1) warnings on /dashboard by giving the chart container an explicit minHeight.
critical_code_review_comments: ai_helpers._parse_json: robust — handles direct JSON, regex-fallback, and a clean error envelope. Good.

/api/ai/chat correctly returns SSE (text/event-stream) with a final {done:true} frame; user + assistant rows are persisted in db.ai_chats with role/session_id/timestamp — sessions list query is sound.
einvoice.precheck_eligibility cleanly enumerates required-field errors and warnings before building the payload — matches schema-1.1 invariants.
Public endpoints (/public/gstin, /public/hsn) correctly skip auth; AI endpoints all require get_org_ctx and were verified to 401/403 without a token.
server.py is now 2158 lines — exceeds the 700-line guideline. Recommend splitting into routers (auth, billing, ai, invoices, public_tools) to keep maintainable.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (all critical flows confirmed visually + via DOM)

test_credentials: owner@vijaytraders.in / admin123 (used for all auth flows)
seed_data_creation: None — relied on existing seeded org + invoices.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Iteration 7 features (AI HSN finder, AI Expense Categorizer, AI streaming chat, GSTIN validator, public HSN search, E-Invoice JSON, Landing free-tools section, public /free/tools page, in-app /tools page, Parties GstinField, Products HsnSuggestButton, InvoiceDetail E-Invoice button) tested and pass. Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_iter7_ai_gst.py. Note: seeded org GSTIN '33AABCT1332L1Z2' fails checksum so e-invoice happy-path returns precheck errors; this is expected behaviour given the seed, not a bug. The precheck-error dialog UX is working as designed.
